channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Pixar Studios Considering Inside Out 3? Writer-Director Reveals Hints of Future Sequels and Franchise Expansion
item.description: Pixar Studios is reportedly considering an Inside Out 3 sequel, with writer-director Kelsey Mann revealing hints of future sequels and franchise expansion.
item.dc:creator: amelia.schwanke@futurenet.com (Amelia Schwanke), TechRadar

item.title: Antioch brackish desalination plant set to begin operations
item.description: Antioch's brackish desalination plant will kickstart operations in the first quarter of 2025. It is expected to treat and convert 6 million gallons a day of brackish water.
item.dc:creator: Hema Sivanandam, The Mercury News

item.title: How to use Gemini AI to make templates in Google Sheets
item.description: Need ideas or motivation to help you build a spreadsheet in Google Sheets? You can browse through the templates that are included in this office app and select one to customize. But a more intriguing option is to use the tool in Sheets called Help Me Organize.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: 30,000 examples of how Ikea works with AI
item.description: Only a few years ago, Ikea developed a group-wide data effort with a particular focus on AI to manage investments, and it’s been a focal imperative ever since.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: La preparación de los datos para la IA; una fantasía para los directivos, un gran reto de TI
item.description: Los directivos de las compañías pueden estar seguros de que los datos de sus organizaciones están listos para la inteligencia artificial (IA), pero los trabajadores de TI cuentan una historia muy diferente: la mayoría pasa horas cada día dándoles forma.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Venezuela's top court issues a $10 million fine for TikTok over allegedly deadly video challenges
item.description: CARACAS, Venezuela (AP) — Venezuela’s Supreme Court on Monday issued a $10 million fine against TikTok for “not implementing measures” to prevent viral video challenges that have allegedly led to the deaths of three Venezuelan children recently.
item.dc:creator: JUAN PABLO ARRAEZ and MANUEL RUEDA, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Small businesses brace themselves for potentially disruptive TikTok ban
item.description: A looming TikTok ban could affect the millions of small businesses that use the short-video social media app to grow their business.
item.dc:creator: Mae Anderson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Verizon, Nvidia team up for enterprise AI networking
item.description: Verizon and Nvidia have partnered to build AI services for enterprises that run workloads over Verizon’s 5G private network. The new offering, 5G Private Network with Enterprise AI, will run a range of AI applications and workloads over Verizon’s private 5G network with Mobile Edge Compute (MEC).
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: The long-term impacts of AI on networking
item.description: AI is either going to spawn a golden age of profits and benefits or kill us all off, according to popular viewpoints on the subject. The latter view has been at least somewhat discredited; if you yell “AI” in a crowded theater these days, hardly anyone runs for the exits.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Travel Troubleshooter: Error message occurs when using Chase points for travel
item.description: When Carlye Siegel tries to book two award tickets with Chase points, the transaction fails. Now Chase won't refund the points.
item.dc:creator: Christopher Elliott, King Features Syndicate, Inc., The Mercury News

item.title: The iPhone SE 4 price leaks again – and it could cost more than the iPhone SE 3
item.description: It seems as though Apple is aiming to get the price of the iPhone SE 4 under $500, based on the latest rumor.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Elon Musk causes uproar by backing Germany’s far-right party AfD
item.description: The Tesla Motors CEO also wrote that his investment in Germany gave him the right to comment on the country’s condition.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: The highs and lows of commercial real estate in 2024: Bay Area offices, hotels and apartments falter, but tech deals offer hope
item.description: Widening loan defaults and foreclosures haunted Bay Area office, hotel and apartment properties in 2024 but a flurry of tech leases are creating some hope.
item.dc:creator: George Avalos, The Mercury News

item.title: Are your smart home cameras spying on you? Study reveals shocking data grabs
item.description: A new study says outdoor security camera apps are among the biggest collectors of user data, including phone numbers, payment details and precise location.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Apple Mail app redesign introduces new categorization feature in iOS 18.2
item.description: In iOS 18.2 and later, Apple's Mail app enhances email management by automatically sorting messages into distinct categories to help find emails faster.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump weighs in on H-1B debate, backs immigration visas
item.description: “I’ve always liked the visas, I have always been in favor of the visas. That’s why we have them,” Trump said in a phone interview with The New York Post published Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, NewsNation

item.title: Trump asks Supreme Court to delay TikTok ban so he can weigh in after he takes office
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump has asked the Supreme Court to pause the potential TikTok ban from going into effect until his administration can pursue a “political resolution” to the issue.
item.dc:creator: Haleluya Hadero, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: New York state government to monitor its use of AI under a new law
item.description: ALBANY, N.Y. (AP) — New York state government agencies will have to conduct reviews and publish reports that detail how they're using artificial intelligence software, under a new law signed by Gov. Kathy Hochul.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: An online debate over foreign workers in tech shows tensions in Trump's political coalition
item.description: An online spat between factions of Donald Trump’s supporters over immigration and the tech industry has thrown internal divisions in the president-elect’s political movement into public display.
item.dc:creator: Michelle L. Price, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Mexico tests cellphone app allowing migrants to send alert if they are about to be detained in US
item.description: MEXICO CITY (AP) — Mexico is developing a cellphone app that will allow migrants to warn relatives and local consulates if they think they are about to be detained by the U.S. immigration department, a senior official said Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: AI is helping students with disabilities. Schools worry about the risks
item.description: For Makenzie Gilkison, spelling is such a struggle that a word like rhinoceros might come out as “rineanswsaurs” or sarcastic as “srkastik.” The 14-year-old from suburban Indianapolis can sound out words, but her dyslexia makes the process so draining that she often struggles with comprehension.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: An ex-OpenAI exec and futurist talks about AI in 2025 and beyond
item.description: Welcome to AI Decoded, Fast Company’s weekly newsletter that breaks down the most important news in the world of AI. You can sign up to receive this newsletter every week here.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: 2024 review: ‘Typhoons’ bookend busy year in cyber
item.description: From Volt Typhoon to Salt Typhoon, major cyber incidents in 2024 shined a spotlight on how agencies are managing cyber threats to critical infrastructure. The post 2024 review: ‘Typhoons’ bookend busy year in cyber first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Why social media influencers are going to have a very big 2025
item.description: As 2024 rolls into 2025, big changes are potentially afoot in the world of social media. TikTok is potentially weeks away from closure in the United States. X (the app formerly known as Twitter) continues to deviate from the mainstream under its ownership by Elon Musk.
item.dc:creator: Chris Stokel-Walker, Fast Company

item.title: Japan Airlines was hit by a cyberattack, delaying flights during the year-end holiday season
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — Japan Airlines said it was hit by a cyberattack Thursday, causing delays to more than 20 domestic flights but the carrier said it was able to stop the onslaught and restore its systems hours later. There was no impact on flight safety, it said.
item.dc:creator: MARI YAMAGUCHI, Associated Press, KRON4
